subject: kernel: kexec_file: fix error return code of kexec_calculate_store_digests()

features.post_operation: assign negative errno to ret before goto error label
features.path_conditions: When allocation returns NULL and code goto's a cleanup label, ret must be set to -ENOMEM (or other negative errno) first
features.fit_test_reasoning: Error-return-code pattern: allocation returns NULL; if-block goto's cleanup label without assigning a negative errno to return variable, causing function to return stale (often 0) ret and mask the failure.
